scripts.cannon:publish: yarn cannon publish cow-ethflow --chain-id 13370 --registry-chain-id 10 && yarn cannon:record
scripts.cannon:record: yarn cannon inspect cow-ethflow:latest --chain-id 13370 --out deploy-json > cannon/deploy.json && yarn cannon inspect cow-ethflow:latest --chain-id 13370 --out misc-json > cannon/misc.json
